user.title: Polyglot Assist
user.description:
Multi-language Tier-1 conversation agent.

Pick an LLM agent to receive unmatched utterances. The intents file is read from `/config/{intents_default}` and reloadable via the `polyglot_assist.reload` service.

error.intents_not_found: Intents file not found at the given path.
error.intents_invalid: Intents file failed validation. Check the log for details.

init.title: Polyglot Assist
init.description: What would you like to do?

change_fallback.title: Fallback conversation agent
change_fallback.description: Pick the agent that receives utterances Polyglot did not match.

edit_visual.title: Choose an intent to edit
edit_visual.description: Pick the intent whose sentences you want to edit.

edit_intent.title: Edit intent: {intent_name}
edit_intent.description: Edit per-language sentences (one per line). Languages already defined: {existing_langs}. To add another language, pick its code below and save — an empty bucket appears for it.

data.response_intent: Target intent_script name (HA intent to dispatch to)

edit_yaml.title: Edit intents.yaml
edit_yaml.description: Edit the raw YAML for /config/polyglot_assist/intents.yaml. Validated on save — if YAML is malformed, no write happens.

add_intent.title: Add a new intent
add_intent.description: Create a new intent. After save, you can add sentences in the visual editor.

reload.title: Reload matcher
reload.description: Rebuild the Hassil matcher from the on-disk intents.yaml. Useful after editing the file externally.

error.invalid_yaml: YAML failed to parse: {err}. Fix the syntax and save again.
error.invalid_name: Intent name must be alphanumeric with optional underscores.
error.name_exists: An intent with that name already exists.

abort.no_intents: No intents found in the file. Use 'Add a new intent' to create one.

reload.name: Reload intents
reload.description: Rebuild the multi-language Hassil matcher from the configured intents file.

test_match.name: Test match
test_match.description: Run a string through the matcher without dispatching.
